summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM tool management fixes. All features working correctly: tool creation, editing, filter dropdowns styling, 3-column grid layout, and spellcheck disabled on cookies textarea.

success_rate.backend: 100% - Tool CRUD APIs working (create, read, update verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test tools: 'Test Tool Creation', 'UI Test Tool Final' via API and UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Tool creation works without validation errors - Tool.js pre-save hook fixed with async/await. 2) Filter dropdowns have consistent dark styling (bg: rgb(30,31,36), text: white, no blue rings). 3) Tools page uses 3-column card grid layout. 4) Cookies textarea has spellcheck='false'. 5) Tool editing works correctly with pre-filled data.

tool_creation.evidence: Created 'UI Test Tool Final' via UI - redirected to tools list with success toast

tool_editing.evidence: Edited 'UI Test Tool Final' description - updated successfully with toast notification

filter_dropdowns_styling.evidence: Category filter: bg=rgb(30,31,36), border=rgb(50,51,58), text=rgb(255,255,255). No blue focus rings.
filter_dropdowns_styling.css_applied: Global CSS in index.css removes default browser styling

tools_page_layout.evidence: Tools displayed in 3-column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3) with professional card design

cookies_spellcheck.evidence: Cookies textarea has spellcheck='false' attribute confirmed via Playwright

flows_tested: Fill all form fields including cookies
